message:
fix(deps,clippy): restore fastapi_rust patch section and fix web module clippy

Restores the missing [patch."...fastapi_rust"] section that was
accidentally removed by another agent, causing duplicate asupersync
versions in the dependency graph. Also removes a self-referential
[patch."...asupersync.git"] that Cargo normalizes to point at itself.

Fixes 17 redundant_pub_crate clippy errors in web_framework module
(pub(crate) in private module → pub) and 6 wildcard_imports warnings
in web submodules using `use super::*`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
